==Biography==
Cookie joined [[Hellions e-Sports Club]] in December 2015, along with fellow Korean player [[Bomb]].<ref name="joinhellions">[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-NasC-OCJKc Introducing Cookie and Bomb] ''youtube.com''</ref>

== Trivia ==
*  In 2013, Cookie was offered a place on a Chinese team, but he could not join due to mandatory military service.<ref name="joinhellions">[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-NasC-OCJKc Introducing Cookie and Bomb] ''youtube.com''</ref>
